title: Fix parameterized virtual interface error message
body:
Got this error during a UVC porting. Can we consider enhancing it (simple iface --> interface, just in the print)

```log
.
%Error: Internal Error: ../Test_Bench/sub_sys_if.sv:4:11: ../V3LinkDot.cpp:540: Interface referenced by virtual iface is dead. Dead interfaces have required linking steps skipped
                                                        : ... note: In instance 'tb_top.dut.u_output_fifo.u_output_fifo'
```
At first glance I thought the DV engineer coded the vir-interface as "iface", then on a  closer look, it seems like iface is indeed a variable/identifier inside V3LinkDot.cpp 

```cpp
 else if (ifacerefp->ifaceViaCellp()->dead()
                       || !existsNodeSym(ifacerefp->ifaceViaCellp())) {
                ifacerefp->ifaceViaCellp()->v3fatalSrc(
                    "Interface referenced by virtual iface is dead. "
                    "Dead interfaces have required linking steps skipped");
            }
```
Not a big deal, but may help UI/UX.

Thanks
